# Presale With Uzair

> Fraser Valley's leading presale expert. Uzair Muhammad helps first-time buyers and investors secure new construction condos and townhomes in Surrey, Langley, Abbotsford, Chilliwack, and Maple Ridge with VIP access, exclusive incentives, and full contract protection.

Independent, buyer-only representation across BC's Fraser Valley. 400+ units sold, $200M+ in sales volume, 5+ years in the presale market. Available in English, Punjabi, Hindi, and Urdu.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Fraser Valley's #1 presale agent — VIP access, best pricing, contract protection.
- [About](/about): Uzair Muhammad's background, track record, and buyer-protection approach.

- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch by phone, email, or office visit in Surrey, BC.
- [Book a Call](/call): Schedule a free 1-on-1 presale strategy call.
- [Presale Guide](/presale-guide): Free guide — 7 costly mistakes presale buyers make.
- [Blog](/blog): Market insights, presale tips, and buyer education.
